hypothesis: Causal scaling from completed daily equity changes can preserve speed in quiet regimes while reducing adverse-fill breaches after volatility expands.

causal_contract.daily_change: Prague end-of-day marked equity minus the preceding Prague end-of-day marked equity
causal_contract.warmup_behavior: scale 1.0 until lookback completed days exist

selection_gate: Candidate must strictly improve both normal and adverse development pass_pct; select maximum of the smaller improvement, ties by lower maximum risk then name.
validation_gate: Frozen candidate must strictly improve both normal and adverse 2023 pass_pct.
holdout_open_rule: Open 2024-2025 once only after development and 2023 validation pass.
label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
